sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102301" key="tanaw=pis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰνᾰ-ῶπις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὤψ</etym>) <sense id="n102301.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">far-sighted</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:122" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">122</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
